name: contracts
description: > **⚠️ UNAUDITED SCAFFOLD - DO NOT DEPLOY WITH VALUE BEFORE AUDIT.** > Every `.sol` file here is a reference scaffold expressing the contract > architecture from the PRD. It has **not** been audited and **must not** hold > mainnet value until a full security audit is complete (PRD §12). Deep > encoding details (ethfs persistence, full EIP-712 array hashing, conduit > transfers) are intentionally stubbed with `// ...` and marked as such.
